name: 40 - CP v4 multirepo polling - FILE HANDOFF SAFE TEXT - GATE C+D DROPIN CANDIDATE

nodes.name: Data Table - Load all state rows

parameters.jsCode: const target=$('Emit watched repos (3)').item.json;const resp=$input.item.json;const commit=Array.isArray(resp)?resp[0]:resp;const sha=commit?.sha||'';const message=String(commit?.commit?.message||'no commit message').split('\n')[0];return {json:{stateKey:target.stateKey,currentSha:sha,shortSha:sha?sha.substring(0,7):'',message,url:commit?.html_url||'',sourceRepo:target.sourceRepo,ownerRepo:target.ownerRepo}};

const items=$('Prepare latest commit event').all();const rows=$('Data Table - Load all state rows').all().map(i=>i.json);return items.map(item=>{const latest=item.json;const row=rows.find(r=>r.key===latest.stateKey);const previousSha=row?.value||'';return {json:{...latest,previousSha,isNew:Boolean(latest.currentSha&&latest.currentSha!==previousSha),hadStateRow:Boolean(row?.key)}}});

value.note: ={{ 'Latest notified commit SHA for scheduled poll: ' + $json.sourceRepo }}

nodes.name: Data Table - Upsert last seen commit
Telegram - Send Data Table deduped message

parameters.jsCode: return {json:{status:'duplicate_skip',reason:'Latest commit already stored in control_plane_state for this repo key',stateKey:$json.stateKey,sourceRepo:$json.sourceRepo,currentSha:$json.currentSha,previousSha:$json.previousSha}};

const item=$input.first().json;const stdout=String(item.stdout||item.data||item.output||'');const exitCode=item.exitCode??item.code??0;const file='/home/node/.n8n-files/latest-gis-handoff.md';const text=['CONTROL PLANE handoff','Prompt ready: '+(stdout.includes('Prompt ready: yes')?'yes':'see attachment'),'Target: cursor-coordinate-converter','Exit code: '+exitCode,'','Full prompt file: latest-gis-handoff.md','Path in n8n: '+file,'Prompt preview omitted intentionally. Full prompt is attached as a .md file.'].join('\n');return [{json:{telegramText:text,fullPromptPath:file,attachedFileName:'latest-gis-handoff.md'}}];

additionalFields.caption:
CONTROL PLANE handoff file
Target: cursor-coordinate-converter
Full prompt attached: latest-gis-handoff.md

nodes.name: Code - Plan watcher repo gate stub

parameters.jsCode: const commit=$input.first().json;const gate=$('Code - Plan watcher repo gate stub').first().json;const files=Array.isArray(commit.files)?commit.files:[];const planFiles=files.filter(f=>/^docs\/plans\/[^/]+\.plan\.md$/.test(String(f.filename||'')));if(!planFiles.length){return [{json:{event:'no_plan_detected',repo:gate.repo,commitSha:gate.currentSha,shortSha:gate.shortSha,changedFileCount:files.length,changedFiles:files.map(f=>f.filename).slice(0,30),gate:'C+D-dropin-candidate'}}];}return planFiles.map(f=>({json:{event:'plan_detected',repo:gate.repo,commitSha:gate.currentSha,shortSha:gate.shortSha,latestCommitUrl:gate.latestCommitUrl,latestCommitMessage:gate.latestCommitMessage,planPath:f.filename,fileStatus:f.status||'',additions:f.additions??null,deletions:f.deletions??null,changes:f.changes??null,gate:'C+D-dropin-candidate'}}));

nodes.name: Code - Detect real docs/plans plan files

parameters.jsCode: const j=$json;const lines=['CONTROL PLANE plan_detected',`Repo: ${j.repo}`,`Plan: ${j.planPath}`,`Commit: ${j.shortSha}`,`Status: ${j.fileStatus}`,`Changes: +${j.additions ?? '?'} / -${j.deletions ?? '?'}`,'',`Message: ${j.latestCommitMessage || ''}`,`URL: https://github.com/${j.repo}/blob/${j.commitSha}/${j.planPath}`,'','Gate D LIVE. Review the plan in GitHub before execution.'];return {json:{text:lines.join('\n'),event:j.event,planPath:j.planPath,repo:j.repo,commitSha:j.commitSha}};

nodes.name: Format Gate D Telegram plan_detected message

parameters.jsCode: return {json:{status:'gate_c_no_plan_detected',event:$json.event,repo:$json.repo,commitSha:$json.commitSha,shortSha:$json.shortSha,gate:'C+D-dropin-candidate',note:'No plan file in this commit; no Gate D Telegram sent.'}};
